wiki:battlerig-bed-racer.description: Used to decorate the bed of your BattleRig with an off-road racer look.

wiki:battlerig-bed-rollcage.description: Used to decorate the bed of your BattleRig with a barebones look.

wiki:battlerig-bed-truck.description: Used to decorate the bed of your BattleRig with a monster truck look.

wiki:battlerig-cab-racer.description: Used to decorate the cab of your BattleRig with an off-road racer look.

wiki:battlerig-cab-rollcage.description: Used to decorate the cab of your BattleRig with a barebones look.

wiki:battlerig-cab-truck.description: Used to decorate the cab of your BattleRig with a monster truck look.

wiki:battlerig-engine-racer.description: Used to decorate the engine block of your BattleRig with an off-road racelook.

wiki:battlerig-engine-rollcage.description: Used to decorate the engine block of your BattleRig with a barebones look.

wiki:battlerig-engine-truck.description: Used to decorate the engine block of your BattleRig with a monster truck look.

wiki:battlerig-frontend-mod-cowcatcher.description: Attach this to the front of your BattleRig to gain a physical deflector that allows you to keep your speed while ramming things.

wiki:battlerig-frontend-mod-extra-armor.description: Attach this to the front of your BattleRig to gain extra armor that increases its surviability.

wiki:battlerig-frontend-mod-harvest-saw.description: Attach this to the front of your BattleRig to gain a harvesting buzzsaw that harvests the Resources you ram into.

wiki:battlerig-frontend-mod-spiked-grill.description: Attach this to the front of your BattleRig to gain spikes that deal extra damage during rams, also reflects all melee damage dealt to your BattleRig.

wiki:battlerig-rearend-mod-afterburner.description: Attach this to the rear of your BattleRig, then activate it to gain a boost of forward speed.

wiki:battlerig-rearend-mod-jump-jets.description: Attach this to the rear of your BattleRig, then activate it to jump off the ground of gain a minor flight boost while in air.

wiki:battlerig-rearend-mod-smokescreen.description: Attach this to the rear of your BattleRig, then activate it to release obscuring smoke behind you.

wiki:battlerig-rearend-mod-towhook.description: Attach this to the rear of your BattleRig, then activate it to grapple onto terrain, Creatures, Survivors, and more.

wiki:battlerig-wheels-racer.description: Used to decorate the wheels and suspension of your BattleRig with a monster truck look. Has the highest top speed, but the widest turning radius.

wiki:battlerig-wheels-rollcage.description: Used to decorate the wheels and suspension of your BattleRig with a barebones look. Has an average top speed, and an average turning radius.

wiki:battlerig-wheels-truck.description: Used to decorate the wheels and suspension of your BattleRig with a monster truck look. Has the lowest top speed, but the tightest turning radius.
